message:
perf: eliminate intermediate allocations in resource loading, fix Arc<str> test sites

Resource loading (resources.rs):
- Replace 8 collect-then-extend patterns with direct iterator extension,
  eliminating intermediate Vec allocations during startup path.

SDK tests (sdk.rs):
- Update AgentEvent::AgentStart construction to use .into() for Arc<str>
  session_id fields, fixing test compilation after session_id type change.

Agent formatting (agent.rs):
- Reformat AssistantMessageEvent construction to satisfy linter after
  the Box removal in prior commit.

Model registry (models.rs):
- Fix built_in_models() callsites to pass required ModelRegistryLoadMode
  parameter after signature change.
- Fix clippy or_fun_call lint (unwrap_or -> unwrap_or_else).

CLI list-models (main.rs):
- Incorporate concurrent agent's list-models cache optimization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
